# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservice1
  labels:
    app: microservice1
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservice1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservice1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: microservice1
        image: your-microservice1-image
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080

---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservice2
  labels:
    app: microservice2
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservice2
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservice2
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: microservice2
        image: your-microservice2-image
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
